title: Aptiv to Present at the Evercore ISI Global Clean Energy & Transition Technologies Summit
text: DUBLIN , May 31, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Aptiv PLC (NYSE: APTV), a global technology company focused on making mobility safer, greener, and more connected, will present at the Evercore ISI Global Clean Energy & Transition Technologies Summit, June 15 at 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time.

title: Aptiv Declares Quarterly Preferred Share Dividend
text: DUBLIN , May 18, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Aptiv PLC (NYSE: APTV)  a global technology company focused on making mobility safer, greener and more connected, today announced that its Board of Directors declared a quarterly cash dividend of $1.375 per share on its 5.50% Series A Mandatory Convertible Preferred Shares, payable on June 15, 2023, to shareholders of record at the close of business on June 1, 2023. About Aptiv Aptiv is a global technology company that develops safer, greener and more connected solutions enabling a more sustainable future of mobility.

title: The EV Boom Is Here: Buy These 2 Stocks
text: Electric vehicle market share in the U.S. has hit a tipping point, and these companies should benefit. Rivian's vehicle production is increasing, losses are narrowing, and its balance sheet is solid.

title: Aptiv (APTV) Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates, Increase Y/Y
text: Aptiv's (APTV) first-quarter 2023 revenues improve year over year.

title: Aptiv PLC (APTV) Q1 Earnings and Revenues Top Estimates
text: Aptiv PLC (APTV) came out with quarterly earnings of $0.91 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.89 per share. This compares to earnings of $0.63 per share a year ago.

title: Aptiv Reports First Quarter 2023 Financial Results
text: Strong Bookings and Record Revenue DUBLIN , May 4, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Aptiv PLC (NYSE: APTV), a global technology company focused on making mobility safer, greener and more connected, today reported first quarter 2023 U.S. GAAP earnings of $0.54 per diluted share. Excluding special items, first quarter earnings totaled $0.91 per diluted share.

title: Aptiv (APTV) to Report Q1 Earnings: What's in the Offing?
text: Aptiv's (APTV) first-quarter 2023 earnings and revenues are likely to have increased year over year.
